_meta.purpose: Boundary-condition test funds — for debugging the model and as extreme-example material when probing model behaviour.
_meta.use_in_demo: Contrived fixtures — pull them out only if a reviewer explicitly asks about boundary behaviour or the breaking point of the model.
_meta.disclaimer: Synthetic test fixtures, not representative of any real fund.

funds.name: 100% EV Powertrain (pure)
funds.narrative_for_demo: The single-sector worst case. Use to anchor what the model thinks the floor of a stressed EV-pure portfolio looks like.

funds.name: 100% Data-Center Power (pure)
funds.narrative_for_demo: The single-sector best case. Use as a contrast to EV-pure — the gap is the model's main argument.

funds.name: 100% Renewable Power (pure)
funds.narrative_for_demo: Test how the policy-shock sub-sector behaves in isolation.

funds.name: 100% Industrial Drives (pure)
funds.narrative_for_demo: The defensive baseline. Shows the lower envelope of cyclicality across power electronics.

funds.name: Equal weights (25/25/25/25)
funds.strategy: Test fixture: maximally diversified across the four sub-sectors
funds.narrative_for_demo: The naive-diversification baseline. Compare against the realistic Diversified European Industrial Tech Fund in example_funds.json — what changes when the diversification is unequal?

funds.name: Engineered near-breach (calibrated to ~64.9% LTV at 50%)
funds.strategy: Test fixture: parameters chosen so stressed LTV lands ~0.1pp below covenant under aggressive sizing
funds.narrative_for_demo: The hair's-breadth case. Useful for live-demonstrating how small a tilt is needed to flip from 'safe' to 'breach' — bump EV exposure by 1pp and watch it cross.

funds.name: EV-heavy fund with small facility — should be safe
funds.strategy: Test fixture: high EV concentration but conservative facility sizing
funds.narrative_for_demo: Demonstrates that 'concentration' alone doesn't breach — it's concentration AND aggressive sizing together. Useful for the 'why don't you just always size down?' question.

funds.name: Defensive mix with very aggressive facility
funds.strategy: Test fixture: heavy data-center + industrial (defensive sub-sectors) but high initial LTV
funds.narrative_for_demo: The 'I trusted the secular tailwind' case. Even with very aggressive sizing, defensive mix holds up — but only just.
